companyName: Grand Hotel des Bains Kempinski St. Moritz
notes: Grand Hotel des Bains Kempinski — luxury 5-star hotel in St. Moritz (GR). Also covers Kempinski Palace Engelberg (OW). Pinpoint ATS confirmed active at kempinski.pinpointhq.com (live postings verified 2026-03-19). JSON API endpoint per Pinpoint developer docs: /postings.json (standard for all Pinpoint subdomains). Individual posting URL pattern: kempinski.pinpointhq.com/postings/<uuid>. HTML listing: https://kempinski.pinpointhq.com/en/vacancies
